projectSummary.name: amaCafe
projectSummary.description: amaCafe — proyecto de la cadena de cafés AMA. Workspace canónico: import-1777213083759-63z86j. Alias histórico legacy: import-1776956320164-2m9x2n (deprecated).

decisions.userRationale: : Restauración + Validación E2E del Bulk Import (Balanceada) ⭐ RECOMENDADA

proceder con  OPTION B: git filter-repo — Purga Estándar Recomendada Oficialmente ⭐ RECOMENDADA
decisions.userRationale: : git filter-repo — Purga Estándar Recomendada Oficialmente ⭐ RECOMENDADA

decisions.decisionPoint: proceder con OPTION B: Fix + Refactor a keys-shared-module (Balanceado) ⭐ RECOMENDADA
proceder con  OPTION B: Railway Volume — Balanced ⭐ RECOMENDADA

learnings.title: Decision Gate con 3 opciones diferenciadas
learnings.description: Phase 2 SYNAPTIC requiere A/B/C con pros/cons/risk/confidence cuantificados
learnings.context: Cualquier ciclo que entre en Phase 2 Decision Gate

learnings.title: git filter-repo recomendado oficialmente sobre filter-branch
learnings.description: Es el sustituto oficial de Git para reescritura de historial; cubre archivos y contenido
learnings.context: Purga de secretos del historial git

learnings.title: Rotación de credenciales es prerequisito Y obligatorio post-purga
learnings.description: Aunque se rote antes, tras purgar historial deben rotarse TODAS las credenciales expuestas
learnings.context: Operaciones de purga de .env del historial

learnings.title: Recreación total destruye trazabilidad SYNAPTIC
learnings.description: Squash inicial rompe vínculo BITACORA↔commits y contradice principio Traceable
learnings.context: Decisiones sobre limpieza de historial en proyectos SYNAPTIC

learnings.title: Backup obligatorio + tag pre-purge antes de force-push
learnings.description: Zip de .git+working tree y tag pre-purge-c77 permiten rollback granular
learnings.context: Antes de cualquier operación destructiva sobre historial git

learnings.title: git filter-repo standard purge workflow
learnings.description: Backup tar.gz + tag, install filter-repo, run purge, verify with rev-list/fsck, document rollback
learnings.context: When purging sensitive files from git history on local-only repo without remote

learnings.title: filter-repo rewrites pre-existing tags
learnings.description: Tags created before filter-repo run get rewritten to new SHAs; rollback must rely on physical tar.gz backup
learnings.context: When using pre-purge tags as safety net before git filter-repo

learnings.title: Local-only repo reduces purge blast radius
learnings.description: Sin remote configurado, no requiere force-push ni coordinación con colaboradores; operación reversible vía tar.gz
learnings.context: Evaluating risk of git history rewrites

learnings.title: History purge does not invalidate exposed credentials
learnings.description: Limpiar el repo no rota secretos; rotación manual obligatoria post-purga para mitigar riesgo real
learnings.context: After removing .env or secrets from git history

learnings.title: Preferencia por opciones recomendadas oficialmente
learnings.description: Usuario eligió OPTION B explícitamente etiquetada como 'Recomendada Oficialmente' en Decision Gate
learnings.context: Decision gates con múltiples opciones técnicas

learnings.title: Etapas críticas con verificación entre cada una
learnings.description: Operaciones HIGH-RISK irreversibles se ejecutan por fases con validación intermedia (inventario→backup→ejecución→verificación)
learnings.context: Operaciones destructivas o irreversibles en repos/sistemas

learnings.title: Duplicación de lógica criptográfica en script de rotación
learnings.description: rotate-encryption-secret.js duplica constantes/funciones de crypto.js en lugar de importarlas
learnings.context: Cualquier script auxiliar que toque cifrado debe reusar el módulo central, no copiarlo

learnings.title: Riesgo de corrupción silenciosa por divergencia cripto
learnings.description: Si crypto.js cambia algoritmo/salt y el script duplicado no, la rotación corrompe la BD sin error visible
learnings.context: Detectar duplicación de primitives criptográficas como riesgo CRÍTICO, no estético

learnings.title: Modelo de key-versioning con prefijo v{N}:iv:tag:cipher
learnings.description: Formato versionado permite zero-downtime rotation y migración progresiva con checkpoint
learnings.context: Considerar para compliance PCI/SOC2 futuro o cuando se requiera rollback de claves

learnings.title: Usuario delega alcance vía Decision Gate explícito
learnings.description: Solicita decision gate con tres niveles de alcance en lugar de implementar el más amplio por defecto
learnings.context: El usuario prefiere control granular sobre scope antes de invertir esfuerzo

learnings.title: Shared crypto module preserves public API
learnings.description: Refactor duplicated crypto primitives into shared module while keeping wrapper API intact for consumers
learnings.context: When eliminating duplication between rotator scripts and runtime modules

learnings.title: Cross-module ciphertext compatibility tests
learnings.description: Add explicit tests validating ciphertexts encrypted in one module can be decrypted in another
learnings.context: When refactoring shared cryptographic logic to ensure no data migration needed

learnings.title: Smoke test via node import failure
learnings.description: Validate refactored script loads cleanly by checking it fails on missing env, not SyntaxError
learnings.context: Quick validation of module imports without full execution environment

learnings.title: Balanced option preferred over minimal/maximal
learnings.description: User selected OPTION B (Fix + Refactor) over A (minimal fix) or C (full versioning)
learnings.context: Decision Gate selection between scope tiers

learnings.title: Defer scope explicitly with rationale
learnings.description: Bug #2 versioning explicitly deferred to OPTION C — documented why out of scope
learnings.context: When implementing balanced refactor that intentionally leaves work for future

learnings.title: Hybrid execution: implement + Decision Gate
learnings.description: User authorizes immediate execution for low-risk B-tasks while reserving Decision Gate for strategic ones
learnings.context: When cycle has multiple B-tasks with mixed risk/strategic weight

learnings.title: Backwards-compatible env-driven config
learnings.description: Use `import.meta.env.VAR || '/api'` with trailing-slash strip to make BASE configurable without breaking dev
learnings.context: Frontend api.js when adding deploy-target flexibility

learnings.title: Railway preDeployCommand for migrations
learnings.description: railway.toml [deploy] preDeployCommand=node scripts/migrate.js runs idempotent schema migration before service start
learnings.context: Railway deploys with Postgres requiring schema sync

learnings.title: Frontend Railway service via vite preview
learnings.description: Frontend railway.toml uses `npm ci && npm run build` + `vite preview --host 0.0.0.0 --port $PORT`
learnings.context: Deploying Vite SPA as separate Railway service

learnings.title: Railway ephemeral FS breaks runtime uploads
learnings.description: Files written at runtime (multer disk uploads) lost on every redeploy/restart in Railway containers
learnings.context: Any backend with admin uploads or generated assets deployed to Railway without a Volume

learnings.title: Standalone migrate.js enables preDeploy hook
learnings.description: Extracting migration logic to scripts/migrate.js (vs inline server boot) lets CI/Railway run it independently
learnings.context: When deploys need pre-start schema sync separate from app boot

learnings.title: Single source of truth for storage paths
learnings.description: Centralize IMAGES_DIR resolution in one util so routes and static mount stay aligned
learnings.context: When multiple modules need the same configurable filesystem path

learnings.title: Mount specific static path before broader one
learnings.description: Express mounts /static/products from volume BEFORE /static so volume overrides bundled assets
learnings.context: Express static middleware ordering with overlapping paths

learnings.title: Idempotent seed script via preDeployCommand
learnings.description: Chain migrate.js && seed-volume-images.js in preDeploy; copy only when target empty
learnings.context: Bootstrapping persistent volumes on first deploy without re-copying on every restart

learnings.title: Volume resolver rejects relative paths
learnings.description: IMAGES_STORAGE_PATH must be absolute; empty/missing falls back to fuentes/products for local dev
learnings.context: Configuring storage path across local dev and Railway deploy

learnings.title: Smoke-test seed scripts with temp dirs
learnings.description: Verify first-run copy + second-run skip with IMAGES_STORAGE_PATH=/tmp/... before deploying
learnings.context: Validating idempotent filesystem operations locally

learnings.title: User picks Balanced options when offered tiers
learnings.description: User selected OPTION B (Balanced) over A (minimal) and C (object storage) for image persistence
learnings.context: Decision gates with effort/complexity tradeoffs

learnings.title: DB-seeded config blocks env override
learnings.description: Migration 004 seeded sumup_mode='mock' in settings; getModeWithSource read DB first so env fallback never fired and failsafe exit(1) trapped operator out of UI.
learnings.context: When config has both DB-persisted and env-var sources with DB precedence on fresh deploys

learnings.title: One-shot env→DB promotion on boot
learnings.description: bootstrapModeFromEnv() UPSERTs valid env value into settings before failsafe resolves, with cache invalidation and per-outcome logging.
learnings.context: Reconciling env-var intent with DB-persisted config during cold-start

learnings.title: node_modules + .DS_Store tracked despite .gitignore
learnings.description: 1243 node_modules files and 4 .DS_Store files were in the index; .gitignore alone doesn't untrack already-committed paths.
learnings.context: Repos where files were committed before .gitignore was added

learnings.title: Pre-commit hook with regex precision
learnings.description: Initial .env regex over-matched .env.example; precise patterns + smoke-test against tmp git repo before declaring hook ready.
learnings.context: Writing git hooks that block categories of files

learnings.title: Multi-item requests executed in IMMEDIATE EXECUTION (DG-079)
learnings.description: User chained three independent C86 follow-ups in one request expecting all executed without re-confirmation per item.
learnings.context: When user explicitly references prior cycle recommendations

learnings.title: C86 G/R items lived only in conversation
learnings.description: G1-G4 and R1-R9 labels weren't persisted to disk; had to reconstruct meaning from code inspection.
learnings.context: When prior cycle reports use ad-hoc labels not saved to BITACORA/REGISTRY

learnings.title: Stage-only cleanup for large deletions
learnings.description: git rm --cached run but commit deferred to user — 1247 file/-223856 line deletion staged for review before commit.
learnings.context: When sweeping index changes need human eyes before history is rewritten

learnings.title: Usuario prefiere opciones balanceadas (Option B)
learnings.description: 5/5 últimas decisiones del usuario favorecieron la opción B (balanceada) sobre conservadora o innovadora
learnings.context: Decision Gates con tres opciones A/B/C

learnings.title: Decision Gate sobre mecánica de push inicial
learnings.description: Push inicial a remote vacío requiere decidir: rename branch, manejo de tags, branch protection
learnings.context: Primer push a repo GitHub recién creado tras filter-repo

learnings.title: Pre-flight checks obligatorios antes de push post-purga
learnings.description: Verificar remote, .gitignore, tag respaldo, credenciales rotadas, log post-purga antes de pushear
learnings.context: Push inicial tras git filter-repo que eliminó secretos

learnings.title: Tag pre-purge-c77 sólo local es single-point-of-failure
learnings.description: Mantener tag de respaldo de purga sólo en local arriesga pérdida por fallo de disco
learnings.context: Estrategia de respaldo post-filter-repo

learnings.title: Dual branch master+main genera ruido sin beneficio
learnings.description: Publicar ambas ramas con mismo HEAD confunde y branch protection estricta sin team bloquea workflow
learnings.context: MVP de un solo desarrollador

implementationState.lastCompletedTask: Decision Gate resolved: Option B selected
implementationState.currentTask: Implementing Option B as requested by user

archivedLearnings.title: Migración idempotente para reparar base faltante
archivedLearnings.description: Cuando una migración asume estado previo no existente, crear migración anterior idempotente
archivedLearnings.context: Reparación de migraciones rotas en orden lexicográfico

archivedLearnings.title: Migración 011 asumía base inexistente
archivedLearnings.description: Migración 011 referenciaba products.deleted_at y products_audit sin crearlos previamente
archivedLearnings.context: Detectado al implementar bulk import con soft delete

archivedLearnings.title: Bug preexistente: AuthContext no existe
archivedLearnings.description: main.jsx, AdminPage.jsx, LoginPage.jsx, UsersTab.jsx importan ./context/AuthContext que no existe
archivedLearnings.context: Bloquea npm run build del frontend, no relacionado con C3

archivedLearnings.title: Dry-run vs apply en bulk operations
archivedLearnings.description: Bulk import expone ?dry_run=0|1 con feedback fila-por-fila antes de commit transaccional
archivedLearnings.context: Operaciones masivas con feedback de validación

archivedLearnings.title: Auditoría con action='bulk_import'
archivedLearnings.description: Operaciones masivas se registran en products_audit con action específica para trazabilidad
archivedLearnings.context: Auditoría de operaciones admin

archivedLearnings.title: BITACORA desync vs filesystem real
archivedLearnings.description: BITACORA reportaba estado menos grave que el real - carpeta context/ completa no existe
archivedLearnings.context: Auditorías de ciclo previo deben verificarse contra filesystem real

archivedLearnings.title: Auditoría de imports rotos antes de build
archivedLearnings.description: Grep de imports vs existencia de archivos detecta bugs bloqueantes sin ejecutar build
archivedLearnings.context: Cuando se sospecha de archivos faltantes en frontend

archivedLearnings.title: Contextos faltantes bloquean build E2E
archivedLearnings.description: AuthContext, CartContext, ToastContext no existen pero son importados por 4+ archivos
archivedLearnings.context: Frontend no compila hasta restaurar los 3 contextos

archivedLearnings.title: Tab separada para Bulk Import
archivedLearnings.description: Usuario prefiere tab nueva 'Importación Masiva' separada de 'Gestión Productos'
archivedLearnings.context: Decisiones UX para features admin

archivedLearnings.title: SKU opcional en productos nuevos
archivedLearnings.description: SKU no es obligatorio al crear productos vía bulk import
archivedLearnings.context: Validación de productos en bulk import

archivedLearnings.title: Imágenes en almacenamiento local
archivedLearnings.description: Imágenes se guardan en filesystem local (fuentes/products/), no en cloud
archivedLearnings.context: Estrategia de almacenamiento de assets

archivedLearnings.title: Soft delete vía Excel con action=delete
archivedLearnings.description: Bulk import soporta eliminación lógica usando columna action=delete (deleted_at)
archivedLearnings.context: Operaciones masivas sobre productos

archivedLearnings.title: Categorías solo existentes
archivedLearnings.description: Bulk import NO auto-crea categorías; valida contra existentes
archivedLearnings.context: Validación de relaciones en bulk import

archivedLearnings.title: Acceso restringido a admin autenticado
archivedLearnings.description: Endpoints de bulk import detrás de requireAuth, solo admins
archivedLearnings.context: Seguridad de operaciones masivas

archivedLearnings.title: Context API: Provider+hook in same file
archivedLearnings.description: Use eslint-disable react-refresh/only-export-components when colocating Provider and hook
archivedLearnings.context: React Context API implementation in Vite projects with react-refresh

archivedLearnings.title: Lazy state init avoids setState in effect
archivedLearnings.description: Initialize state from localStorage with lazy initializer instead of useEffect setState
archivedLearnings.context: When hydrating React state from persistent storage on mount

archivedLearnings.title: Migration 010a unblocks 011 precondition
archivedLearnings.description: Alphabetical order 010 -> 010a -> 011 ensures dependency satisfied before next migration
archivedLearnings.context: PostgreSQL migration ordering with intermediate fix migrations

archivedLearnings.title: API-first context design
archivedLearnings.description: Read consumer files first to derive exact context API contract before implementing
archivedLearnings.context: When restoring missing modules consumed by existing components

archivedLearnings.title: Decision Gates con 3 opciones (A/B/C)
archivedLearnings.description: Usuario espera siempre 3 opciones: Conservadora, Balanceada (recomendada), Innovadora
archivedLearnings.context: Phase 1 SPECIFICATION del protocolo SYNAPTIC

archivedLearnings.title: Out-of-scope lint errors not fixed
archivedLearnings.description: User accepts leaving preexisting lint errors in untouched files; only fix introduced issues
archivedLearnings.context: When validating builds with mixed preexisting and new errors

archivedLearnings.title: Endpoints CRUD transaccionales con auditoría
archivedLearnings.description: Usar BEGIN/COMMIT/ROLLBACK y registrar en products_audit con CHECK constraint de migración 011
archivedLearnings.context: Endpoints admin de productos que mutan datos

archivedLearnings.title: Validación SKU único entre vivos pre-INSERT/UPDATE
archivedLearnings.description: Validar SKU único excluyendo soft-deleted antes de mutaciones, devolver 409 explícito
archivedLearnings.context: Endpoints POST/PUT de productos

archivedLearnings.title: Soft-delete con motivo y restore reversible
archivedLearnings.description: DELETE registra motivo opcional; POST /restore revierte; ambos auditados
archivedLearnings.context: Operaciones destructivas en productos

archivedLearnings.title: Componente CRUD dedicado para mantener AdminPage limpio
archivedLearnings.description: Crear ProductsCrudPanel.jsx separado e integrar como sub-vista en ProductsTab
archivedLearnings.context: Al añadir nuevas vistas admin complejas

archivedLearnings.title: Ajuste de stock soporta modos absolute y delta
archivedLearnings.description: PATCH /stock acepta mode='absolute' o 'delta' con audit_action='stock_adjust'
archivedLearnings.context: Operaciones rápidas de stock desde la tabla

archivedLearnings.title: Destructuring renombrado dispara error de ESLint preexistente
archivedLearnings.description: Mismo patrón que afecta AdminPage.jsx:30:27; preferir inlinear componente helper
archivedLearnings.context: Al introducir helpers en componentes React de este repo

archivedLearnings.title: Reutilizar upload-image del bulk import en CRUD individual
archivedLearnings.description: Reusar el mismo endpoint/componente de upload-image existente en lugar de duplicar
archivedLearnings.context: Subida de imagen única en el formulario CRUD de producto

archivedLearnings.title: Galería multi-imagen con primary flag
archivedLearnings.description: UNIQUE INDEX parcial sobre is_primary garantiza máximo una imagen principal por producto
archivedLearnings.context: Modelos 1:N donde un registro debe ser destacado

archivedLearnings.title: Auditoría granular en products_audit
archivedLearnings.description: Cada operación CRUD de imágenes registra entrada en tabla de auditoría
archivedLearnings.context: Endpoints administrativos con trazabilidad

archivedLearnings.title: Cleanup físico al eliminar imagen
archivedLearnings.description: DELETE endpoint borra archivo del filesystem además de la fila en DB
archivedLearnings.context: Manejo de uploads para evitar archivos huérfanos

archivedLearnings.title: Survey previo evita duplicación de trabajo
archivedLearnings.description: Cycle 9 ya cubría prioridad 1, survey permitió saltar directo a prioridad 2
archivedLearnings.context: Cuando se reciben prompts con múltiples prioridades secuenciales

archivedLearnings.title: Priorizar CRUD individual antes que galería de imágenes
archivedLearnings.description: Usuario pidió implementar CRUD/stock primero y diferir galería de imágenes múltiples
archivedLearnings.context: Al implementar mantenedores de productos en este proyecto

archivedLearnings.title: No tocar Bulk Import
archivedLearnings.description: Usuario excluyó explícitamente Bulk Import del scope del Ciclo 9
archivedLearnings.context: Trabajo en módulo de productos admin

archivedLearnings.title: No introducir regresiones de lint
archivedLearnings.description: Mantener contador de errores ESLint igual al baseline (13 preexistentes)
archivedLearnings.context: Validación post-implementación

archivedLearnings.title: Backward compatibility con image_url
archivedLearnings.description: Mantener products.image_url sincronizado con imagen primaria al implementar galería 1:N
archivedLearnings.context: Al extender modelo de datos sin romper código existente

archivedLearnings.title: Galería solo en edición, no en creación
archivedLearnings.description: Modal de creación muestra aviso 'Guarda primero' antes de habilitar gestión de imágenes
archivedLearnings.context: UX de formularios con recursos dependientes de ID

archivedLearnings.title: Promoción de panel CRUD a tab principal
archivedLearnings.description: Reordenar TABS array, cambiar useState default, agregar render branch, limpiar duplicación en sub-vistas
archivedLearnings.context: Cuando se promueve un sub-componente a pestaña de primer nivel en AdminPage

archivedLearnings.title: Workspaces SYNAPTIC son aislados por ciclo
archivedLearnings.description: Cada ciclo crea workspace nuevo (import-{timestamp}-{hash}); dev server del usuario puede correr desde workspace anterior
archivedLearnings.context: Al reiniciar dev server, verificar desde qué workspace corre el vite activo del usuario

archivedLearnings.title: Reportar SUCCESS sin validación E2E manual posible
archivedLearnings.description: Agente no puede autenticarse en navegador; debe escalar validación visual al usuario antes de cerrar SUCCESS
archivedLearnings.context: Cambios UX que requieren login admin y verificación visual de regresiones

archivedLearnings.title: Limpieza colateral reduce errores preexistentes
archivedLearnings.description: Remover sub-vista duplicada 'crud' redujo errores lint de 13 a 7 sin introducir nuevos
archivedLearnings.context: Al promover componentes, eliminar acceso duplicado mejora calidad de código

archivedLearnings.title: useCallback huérfano tras remover guard
archivedLearnings.description: Eliminar branches condicionales requiere actualizar dependencias de useCallback para evitar warnings
archivedLearnings.context: Refactors que remueven ramas de lógica dentro de hooks memoizados

archivedLearnings.title: Immediate Execution Mode (DG-079)
archivedLearnings.description: Usuario autoriza ejecución directa sin Decision Gate cuando indica 'modo ejecución inmediata'
archivedLearnings.context: Cuando el requerimiento es claro y el usuario explicita bypass del Decision Gate

archivedLearnings.title: Stale backend from prior workspace
archivedLearnings.description: Backend PID was running from old workspace dir, masking new routes as 404 across cycles 11-17
archivedLearnings.context: Multi-workspace projects sharing ports; verify process cwd before debugging missing endpoints

archivedLearnings.title: Express 5 + path-to-regexp v8 break inline regex
archivedLearnings.description: Route patterns like ':id(\d+)' crash startup; remove regex and use Number.isInteger guard in handler
archivedLearnings.context: Any Express 5 migration or new route definition with numeric param constraints

archivedLearnings.title: Vite must proxy /static for backend-served assets
archivedLearnings.description: Without '/static' proxy, uploaded images return SPA HTML instead of file (silent failure)
archivedLearnings.context: Vite dev server fronting a backend that serves uploaded media

archivedLearnings.title: Architect-mode cycles missed runtime state
archivedLearnings.description: Pure code analysis cannot detect process/cwd mismatches; runtime inspection (lsof) is required
archivedLearnings.context: When user reports 'fix doesn't work' despite correct commits

archivedLearnings.title: Single-word 'arregla' = full diagnostic + fix
archivedLearnings.description: Terse user requests after frustration cycles expect immediate execution, not more analysis
archivedLearnings.context: User has been through multiple architect-mode cycles without resolution

archivedLearnings.title: Three-option Decision Gate structure
archivedLearnings.description: Conservative / Balanced (recommended) / Innovative trio with pros, cons, time, risk, confidence
archivedLearnings.context: Phase 1 Specification when multiple roadmap paths are viable

archivedLearnings.title: Cycles 19-20 left payment flow in analysis without implementation
archivedLearnings.description: ARCHITECT MODE cycles produced analysis of checkout redirect + success page but no fix shipped
archivedLearnings.context: Open work item: payment flow needs implementation cycle

archivedLearnings.title: Post cycles 11-17, evidence-of-health is high priority
archivedLearnings.description: User concern after long frustration arc means E2E validation generates trust signal
archivedLearnings.context: Recommending validation sprints over new features

archivedLearnings.title: Tab consolidation with sub-navigation
archivedLearnings.description: Group related tabs under parent tab with underline sub-tabs to reduce visual saturation
archivedLearnings.context: When admin UI has 3+ related tabs cluttering top-level navigation

archivedLearnings.title: Visual hierarchy via differentiated tab styles
archivedLearnings.description: Pills (ámbar) for main tabs, underline (ámbar) for sub-tabs creates clear hierarchy
archivedLearnings.context: Multi-level tab navigation in admin panels

archivedLearnings.title: Conditional mounting preserves sub-tab state
archivedLearnings.description: Separate conditional mounts per sub-tab keeps component state across sub-tab switches
archivedLearnings.context: Sub-navigation where users expect state preservation between tabs

archivedLearnings.title: 7 ESLint errors are preexisting baseline
archivedLearnings.description: The 7 ESLint errors in frontend are preexisting and documented; new changes must not add to them
archivedLearnings.context: Validating lint output after frontend changes in this project

archivedLearnings.title: Ambiguous 'continuar' triggers Decision Gate
archivedLearnings.description: When user says 'continuar' without target, surface 3 highest-leverage paths from roadmap
archivedLearnings.context: User issues vague continuation directive in SYNAPTIC protocol

archivedLearnings.title: Sub-tabs consistente parent+child
archivedLearnings.description: Replicar patrón PRODUCTS_SUBTABS para ORDERS_SUBTABS (Listado/Vista de Cocina) con underline nav
archivedLearnings.context: Cuando se añade vista alterna a una pestaña existente del admin

archivedLearnings.title: Clases Tailwind dinámicas no compilan
archivedLearnings.description: text-${col.accent} no funciona con JIT; usar mapa estático iconCls/badgeCls por clave
archivedLearnings.context: Componentes con estilo condicional por columna/estado en Tailwind

archivedLearnings.title: json_agg con COALESCE a array vacío
archivedLearnings.description: json_agg(...) FILTER + COALESCE(..., '[]'::json) garantiza items[]=[] cuando no hay líneas
archivedLearnings.context: Al exponer relaciones 1:N en endpoints REST sin N+1

archivedLearnings.title: Kanban FIFO con urgencia por antigüedad
archivedLearnings.description: 3 columnas pending/in_progress/out_for_delivery, gris<15m, amarillo 15-29m, rojo >=30m
archivedLearnings.context: Vistas operativas de cocina/kitchen con SLA visual

archivedLearnings.title: node --watch recarga backend automáticamente
archivedLearnings.description: Backend con node --watch detecta cambios SQL/route sin reinicio manual
archivedLearnings.context: Cambios en backend/src durante desarrollo

archivedLearnings.title: Reutilizar endpoints existentes
archivedLearnings.description: Vista de Cocina usa PATCH /admin/orders/:id/status sin crear nuevos endpoints
archivedLearnings.context: Al implementar nuevas UIs sobre flujos de estado existentes

archivedLearnings.title: Lints preexistentes out-of-scope
archivedLearnings.description: No tocar 7 errores ESLint preexistentes en AdminPage.jsx; validar solo nuevos
archivedLearnings.context: Cualquier cambio que toque AdminPage.jsx

archivedLearnings.title: ARCHITECT MODE prolongado sin POST commit pierde contexto
archivedLearnings.description: Ciclos 26-30 en ARCHITECT MODE sin commit POST hicieron perder la tabla de 5 fixes del ciclo 30
archivedLearnings.context: Análisis multi-ciclo sin persistir conclusiones intermedias

archivedLearnings.title: Helper puro derivado + COALESCE en UPDATE
archivedLearnings.description: Extraer lógica de derivación a helper puro y usar COALESCE($n, status) en múltiples UPDATE para consistencia
archivedLearnings.context: Cuando misma transformación payment→fulfillment se replica en webhooks/orders/payments

archivedLearnings.title: Migración SQL idempotente con snapshot a tabla audit
archivedLearnings.description: Backfill legacy debe snapshot estado previo a tabla _audit antes de UPDATE para reversibilidad
archivedLearnings.context: Migraciones que corrigen datos legacy en producción

archivedLearnings.title: node:test built-in evita nuevas deps
archivedLearnings.description: Usar `node --test` con `node:test` para tests cortos sin agregar Jest/Mocha al proyecto
archivedLearnings.context: Tests unitarios de helpers puros en backend Node

archivedLearnings.title: Backend sin --watch requiere reinicio manual
archivedLearnings.description: PID 73456 corre `node src/server.js` directo, fixes no se aplican hasta `kill && npm run dev`
archivedLearnings.context: Workspace import-1776956320164-2m9x2n backend dev workflow

archivedLearnings.title: Modo ejecución inmediata DG-079
archivedLearnings.description: Usuario prefiere ejecutar cambios pequeños (~30 líneas) en un solo ciclo, no fragmentar en re-análisis
archivedLearnings.context: Cuando los cambios son acotados y bien definidos tras fase ARCHITECT

archivedLearnings.title: Global requireAuth oculta rutas públicas
archivedLearnings.description: Mount global con requireAuth swallowea endpoints marcados 'Public' dentro del router
archivedLearnings.context: Express con auth middleware aplicado en app.use() antes del router

archivedLearnings.title: Registrar handler público antes del mount protegido
archivedLearnings.description: Importar handler y registrar ruta pública en server.js ANTES del app.use con requireAuth
archivedLearnings.context: Cuando un router contiene mezcla de rutas públicas y protegidas bajo auth global

archivedLearnings.title: .catch(()=>{}) silencia 401 críticos
archivedLearnings.description: Frontend silenciaba el 401 del endpoint reCAPTCHA dejando siteKey null sin feedback
archivedLearnings.context: Fetch en widgets de UI que dependen de config remota

archivedLearnings.title: Comentario 'Public endpoint' no garantiza acceso público
archivedLearnings.description: El comentario en el route file miente si el mount aplica auth global
archivedLearnings.context: Auditoría de endpoints supuestamente públicos

archivedLearnings.title: Tagline en header pill con responsive hide
archivedLearnings.description: Pill central con hidden md:inline-flex oculta tagline en mobile preservando iconos esenciales
archivedLearnings.context: Headers con logo + tagline + iconos en breakpoints angostos

archivedLearnings.title: Hero compacto reduce padding 70-80%
archivedLearnings.description: py-16 sm:py-24 → py-6 sm:py-8 sube grilla above-the-fold sin perder mensaje
archivedLearnings.context: Cuando hero ocupa demasiado espacio y oculta contenido principal

archivedLearnings.title: Layout flex con shrink-0 + min-w-0 + truncate
archivedLearnings.description: Logo y iconos shrink-0, pill min-w-0 + truncate evita romper layout en breakpoints
archivedLearnings.context: Headers de 3 secciones con contenido variable

archivedLearnings.title: Rotación de ENCRYPTION_SECRET requiere decrypt-old + re-encrypt-new
archivedLearnings.description: No basta cambiar el valor; hay que descifrar con secret viejo y re-cifrar con secret nuevo todos los campos cifrados en DB
archivedLearnings.context: Cuando ENCRYPTION_SECRET cifra datos persistidos (settings.sumup_*, recaptcha_secret_key)

archivedLearnings.title: Script de rotación con dry-run + --apply
archivedLearnings.description: Scripts destructivos deben tener modo dry-run por defecto y flag --apply explícito para ejecutar
archivedLearnings.context: Scripts que modifican datos en producción o reescriben estado persistente

archivedLearnings.title: CSP debe whitelistear SumUp + reCAPTCHA explícitamente
archivedLearnings.description: helmet() con CSP requiere directivas específicas para integraciones de pagos (SumUp) y bot-protection (reCAPTCHA)
archivedLearnings.context: Aplicación con integraciones externas de pagos y captcha

archivedLearnings.title: requireAdmin centralizado en middleware reutilizable
archivedLearnings.description: Middleware exportado desde auth.js y aplicado a los 7 mounts admin en server.js (no inline en cada router)
archivedLearnings.context: Cuando hay múltiples mounts admin que comparten requisito de autorización

archivedLearnings.title: Rate limiters dedicados por endpoint sensible
archivedLearnings.description: Limiters específicos para /login, /bulk-import, /upload-image en lugar de un limiter global único
archivedLearnings.context: Endpoints con perfiles de abuso distintos (brute force vs DoS por upload)

archivedLearnings.title: git rm --cached + .gitignore no purga historial
archivedLearnings.description: Sacar .env del tracking deja el archivo en commits previos; requiere git-filter-repo o BFG para purgar
archivedLearnings.context: Cuando se descubre un secret commiteado por error

archivedLearnings.title: Smoke test post-cambio de seguridad: 401/400 + headers
archivedLearnings.description: Verificar 401 en admin sin auth, 400 en login sin body, y presencia de CSP/HSTS/X-Frame-Options en respuestas
archivedLearnings.context: Después de aplicar middleware de auth, rate-limit y helmet

archivedLearnings.title: Enfoque A pre-aprobado en ciclo previo
archivedLearnings.description: Usuario eligió Enfoque A en ciclo 41; ciclo 42 ejecuta inmediato sin re-confirmar
archivedLearnings.context: Cuando un ciclo previo presenta opciones y usuario elige una explícitamente

archivedLearnings.title: No ejecutar acciones destructivas sin confirmación explícita
archivedLearnings.description: Purga de historial git y rotación real de secrets requieren confirmación previa del usuario
archivedLearnings.context: Operaciones que reescriben historia compartida o invalidan datos cifrados existentes

archivedLearnings.title: Recommendations not persisted in BITACORA
archivedLearnings.description: Cycle 48 verbal recommendations were not written to BITACORA, blocking C49 execution
archivedLearnings.context: When a cycle produces actionable recommendations but only logs the prompt/metrics

archivedLearnings.title: Workspace identity drift across cycles
archivedLearnings.description: Metadata projectName (import-1776956320164-2m9x2n) diverges from physical dir (import-1777213083759-63z86j)
archivedLearnings.context: When .synaptic-workspace.json projectName does not match the active cwd

archivedLearnings.title: Orphan workspace directory risk
archivedLearnings.description: Two workspace dirs exist on disk; only one receives changes — risk of editing wrong path
archivedLearnings.context: Multi-workspace SYNAPTIC setups with historical aliases

archivedLearnings.title: Cwd guard in server.js
archivedLearnings.description: Add startup check that process.cwd() contains expected workspace dir; fail fast if not
archivedLearnings.context: Backend startup in multi-workspace environments

archivedLearnings.title: Minimum-invasive metadata sync for workspace alias divergence
archivedLearnings.description: Add aliasOf/canonicalDir fields + WORKSPACE_IDENTITY.md + DEPRECATED.md marker instead of renaming dirs
archivedLearnings.context: When physical workspace dir differs from historical projectName alias and rename would break INTELLIGENCE chain

archivedLearnings.title: Preserve projectName field on alias divergence
archivedLearnings.description: Original projectName must be retained in .synaptic-workspace.json to keep cycles 1-49 INTELLIGENCE chain intact
archivedLearnings.context: Modifying .synaptic-workspace.json when canonical dir name changed

archivedLearnings.title: DEPRECATED.md marker in orphan directories
archivedLearnings.description: Mark abandoned/orphan dirs with DEPRECATED.md pointing to active canonical dir for discoverability
archivedLearnings.context: When a directory is superseded but cannot be deleted (history, backups, references)

archivedLearnings.title: Decision Gate when ambiguity detected
archivedLearnings.description: Halt and present A/B/C options instead of guessing what 'execute recommendations' means
archivedLearnings.context: When user request references prior cycle output that is not explicitly persisted

archivedLearnings.title: User prefers minimum-invasive options when offered
archivedLearnings.description: User selected OPTION A (mínimo invasivo) over alternatives — favor non-destructive metadata changes
archivedLearnings.context: When presenting multi-option decision gates with invasiveness tradeoffs

archivedLearnings.title: Compromiso 'minimo invasivo' deja deuda técnica
archivedLearnings.description: Cycle 50 preservó projectName legacy por 'continuidad histórica', causando UX confuso en Cycles 51-52
archivedLearnings.context: Cuando se hace rename de workspace, actualizar TODOS los metadata operativos, no solo algunos

archivedLearnings.title: Cadena de aprendizaje vive en decisions[] y BITACORA, no en projectName
archivedLearnings.description: El miedo a romper continuidad histórica al renombrar projectName era infundado
archivedLearnings.context: Audit trail se preserva en previousName, decisions[], BITACORA append-only y backups

archivedLearnings.title: Rename completo con campos de trazabilidad
archivedLearnings.description: Agregar previousProjectName, renamedAt, renamedReason al hacer rename para preservar audit trail
archivedLearnings.context: Al renombrar entidades en metadata JSON

archivedLearnings.title: SYNAPTIC dashboard puede tener cache server-side
archivedLearnings.description: Después de cambiar projectName, dashboard puede requerir reload o restart del servicio platform
archivedLearnings.context: Cuando se modifican metadata files que alimentan el dashboard SYNAPTIC

archivedLearnings.title: Usuario prefiere fix completo sobre compromiso parcial
archivedLearnings.description: Usuario pidió 'proceder con fix ciclo 52' rechazando implícitamente el compromiso de Cycle 50
archivedLearnings.context: Cuando se identifica deuda técnica de ciclos anteriores

archivedLearnings.title: Documentar cambio sin aplicarlo
archivedLearnings.description: C53 declaró rename en WORKSPACE_IDENTITY.md sin tocar .synaptic-workspace.json — deuda técnica 4 ciclos
archivedLearnings.context: Cuando un ciclo edita metadata declarativa pero omite el archivo operativo real

archivedLearnings.title: Verificar archivo en disco tras Edit declarado
archivedLearnings.description: Releer cada archivo prometido modificado con Read/Grep antes de cerrar ciclo; afirmación ≠ cambio
archivedLearnings.context: Tras cualquier ciclo que aplique fixes a múltiples archivos

archivedLearnings.title: .synaptic-workspace.json es la fuente para el dashboard
archivedLearnings.description: El platform service de SYNAPTIC consume projectName de .synaptic-workspace.json para el header del dashboard
archivedLearnings.context: Cualquier rename de proyecto debe actualizar este archivo, no solo WORKSPACE_IDENTITY.md

archivedLearnings.title: PROJECT_INIT.synaptic.project.id debe ser ID físico canónico
archivedLearnings.description: project.id apuntaba al alias legacy; debe ser el directorio físico import-1777213083759-63z86j con legacyAliasId aparte
archivedLearnings.context: Edición de PROJECT_INIT.synaptic tras rename de workspace

archivedLearnings.title: Architect-only cycles no resuelven quejas operacionales
archivedLearnings.description: C54-C56 fueron architect-only y acumularon frustración; quejas persistentes requieren modo ejecutivo
archivedLearnings.context: Cuando una queja se repite ≥2 ciclos sin resolución

archivedLearnings.title: Modo IMMEDIATE EXECUTION cuando se pide acción directa
archivedLearnings.description: 'Ejecuta el fix' sin contexto de revisión = bypass Decision Gate, aplicar fix sin pedir aprobación intermedia
archivedLearnings.context: Cuando el usuario expresa frustración persistente y pide acción inmediata

archivedLearnings.title: Verifica anti-C53 con grep multi-file
archivedLearnings.description: Prima di dichiarare successo, grep del simbolo chiave su tutti i file attesi (8/8)
archivedLearnings.context: Al termine di implementazioni multi-file per evitare false dichiarazioni di completamento

archivedLearnings.title: Naming semantico per evitare collisioni
archivedLearnings.description: customer_instructions distingue da order_items.notes (per prodotto) e address_notes (entrega)
archivedLearnings.context: Quando si aggiungono campi note/instrucciones in domini con più livelli semantici

archivedLearnings.title: Migrazione SQL idempotente con IF NOT EXISTS
archivedLearnings.description: ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS per migrazioni rieseguibili senza errori
archivedLearnings.context: Migrazioni DB in ambienti dev/prod con possibili re-run

archivedLearnings.title: Validazione duale client+server per input testuali
archivedLearnings.description: Cap 1000 chars enforced sia lato server (validation) sia lato UI (maxLength + counter)
archivedLearnings.context: Campi testuali liberi esposti a utenti finali

archivedLearnings.title: Distinzione visiva esplicita in Vista de Cocina
archivedLearnings.description: Icona MessageSquare + bordo accentuato separa istruzioni cliente da indicazioni di consegna
archivedLearnings.context: UI con più tipologie di note che potrebbero essere confuse dall'operatore

archivedLearnings.title: ESLint backend errore preesistente non bloccante
archivedLearnings.description: Config ESLint backend richiede tsconfig.json mancante; node --check sufficiente per syntax
archivedLearnings.context: Validazione backend amaCafe quando ESLint fallisce per config issue non correlati
